title: SHIPPING ASSISTANT – CONTAINMENT SHIPMENT (MNC)
description:
• Up to $4,000 Basic + AWS + average 2 to 3 months Variable Bonus & above

• MNC, Good Benefits

• Working location: Central

• Experience with Containment Shipment

Responsibilities:

  • Performing logistics support, working closely with sales personnel & counter-part logistics team to achieve department goal & target

  • Liaising with logistics counter party on order & shipping document processing.

  • Assist in scheduling & shipment coordination with customers, suppliers and forwarders for inbound & outbound shipments.

  • Liaise with customer & forwarder to ensure timely delivery/collection of goods from warehouse.

  • Check draft shipping document from supplier, forwarder (B/L, Form D, E, etc..) & prepare shipping documentation (such as invoice, packing list, DO, etc) to customers. Ensure all orders are processed & dispatch correctly and timely

  • Managing inventory level & ensure products availability for delivery/shipment

  • Assist with inventory counts & stock audits (quarterly or yearly)

  • Maintain accurate records of shipping & receiving activities, inventory movements and order status update

  • Prepare regular reports on delivery schedules, inventory report & shipment progress for internal teams & management

  • Ensure that all shipping documentation is properly filled, accessible and compliant with company policies.

Requirement:

  • At least a Diploma

  • At least 1 year of experience in Containment Shipment both in import and export

  • Possess some LC knowledge

  • Proficient in Mandarin language to liaise with Chinese speaking counterparts.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified

Kindly email your resume in a detailed Word format to

roy.yeo@peopleprofilers.com

Here at People Profilers, we pride ourselves on being a one-stop human capital solutions provider for your organisation. Our innovative and relationship-focused workforce solutions have been provided across a wide range of industries.
